title: stelis uniflora
intro: Stelis uniflora, also known as the single-flowered stelis, is a species of orchid native to Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits associated with Stelis uniflora include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating wounds, due to its antibacterial and antiviral properties. In herbal preparations, Stelis uniflora is often used to make teas and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
